mapper.select: SELECT PWD_ENC_ALGORITHM pwdEncAlgorithm , PWD_CHG_CYCL_USE_YN pwdChgCycleUseYn , PWD_CHG_CYCL_DD pwdChgCyclDd , LGIN_LMT_USE_YN lginLmtUseYn , LGIN_FAIL_LMT_CNT LginFailLmtCnt , ITSM_USE_YN itsmUseYn , BASE_AUTH_ID baseAuthId , PSSN_PRD_CD pwssPrdCd , ATCH_FILE_SAVE_DIV AtchFileSaveDiv , ATCH_FILE_PATH AtchFilePath FROM STB_B_SYSTEM_POLICY_MNG
